name: testAddAcquirerFormOpensWithCorrectHeaderAndFieldsAndClosesCorrectly
description: Verify 'Add Acquirer' form opens with the correct header and input fields, and closes correctly.
descriptionHtml: Verify 'Add Acquirer' form opens with the correct header and input fields, and closes correctly.
statusMessage:
Locator expected to have text: Add acquirer
Received: Setup acquirer MID

  - waiting for locator("section header")
    8 × locator resolved to <header id=":r8e:" class="flex py-4 px-6 flex-initial text-large font-semibold">Setup acquirer MID</header>
      - unexpected value "Setup acquirer MID"
